title: MATB 5
description: Explore a plethora of interesting dimensions, engage in epic battles with your friends with physics-based vehicles and functional cannons or delve deep into the technical side of modded minecraft in the fifth installment of the MATB series.
body:
### MATB 5 is a kitchen-sink pack with hundreds, nay **thousands** of hours of content to offer.
- Explore a plethora of interesting dimensions from mods like **The Aether**, **The Undergarden** and more. - Build your own ships, planes or tanks to battle your friends while you egg them on via proximity voice chat with the help of **Simple Voice Chat**, **Valkyrien Skies** and addons. - Fulfill your everlasting desire to just settle down on a farm with mods such as **Agricraft**, **Forestry**, **Pam's Harvestcraft 2** and many more. - Countless new blocks and tools to help you build to a standard you never thought you could. - Satisfy the engineer inside you with a vast range of technical mods including, but not limited to **Immersive Engineering**, **CC: Tweaked**, **Integrated Tunnels** and **Create**. - Become the greatest wizard of all time with the help of **Ars Nouveau**, **Mahou Tsukai**, **Psi** and more. - Take in the stunning views given by **Terralith**, **Tectonic** and **Distant Horizons**. With support for **shaders**!
The fifth installment of the MATB series offers you all of the above and much much more.
